title: Preparing DNA Samples from Mixed Sand Prior to Extraction
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sv8ee9w

steps.title: Add 20 mL MilliQ water to pot
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL MilliQ water to pot

steps.title: Remove plant, if any
steps.instruction: Remove plant, if any. Transfer to square petri dish.

steps.title: Push a 50mL Falcon into the...
steps.instruction: Push a 50mL Falcon into the sand up to the 35 mL mark.

steps.title: Tilt pot to a horizontal position...
steps.instruction: Tilt pot to a horizontal position and remove the falcon tube, retaining as much sand as possible. Rotating the tube while removing it may help

steps.title: Cap and wipe down the tube...
steps.instruction: Cap and wipe down the tube exterior using a paper towel with 70% EtOH before labelling with pot ID.

steps.title: Fill tube with sand to the...
steps.instruction: Fill tube with sand to the 40mL mark with MilliQ water

steps.title: Pour through Miracloth into new 50ml tube
steps.instruction: Pour through Miracloth into new 50ml tube. Discard the old tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge tube at 5000 x G for 5 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tube at 5000 x G for 5 minute.

steps.title: Add 1ml water and vortex to resuspend
steps.instruction: Add 1ml water and vortex to resuspend.

steps.title: Transfer to 1
steps.instruction: Transfer to 1.5ml tube for extraction or storage. Dispose of the 50ml tube.

steps.title: Top up tube to 40 ml...
steps.instruction: Top up tube to 40 ml total volume with ultrapure water.
